errors.name: InvalidNAV
errors.msg: Invalid NAV value

errors.name: InvalidUsdcMint
errors.msg: Invalid USDC mint for this pool

errors.name: InvalidPoolUsdcVault
errors.msg: Invalid pool USDC vault for this pool

errors.name: InvalidSettlementAccounts
errors.msg: Invalid settlement account pair

errors.name: InvalidClaimAccount
errors.msg: Invalid claim account provided for settlement

errors.name: InvalidClaimDestination
errors.msg: Invalid USDC destination account for settlement

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Unauthorized access

errors.name: RepaymentExceedsWithdrawal
errors.msg: Repayment amount exceeds withdrawal remaining balance

errors.name: IncompleteSettlementSet
errors.msg: Settlement must include the full open-claim set when the pool vault cannot cover all claims

errors.name: PendingClaimsOutOfSync
errors.msg: On-chain pending claims are lower than the submitted claim set; sync pending claims before settling

errors.name: MintAlreadyInitialized
errors.msg: Bunker Cash mint PDA is already initialized

errors.name: ClaimAmountTooSmall
errors.msg: Claim amount must escrow a non-zero amount of BunkerCash for a non-zero USDC value after fees

errors.name: PurchaseLimitExceeded
errors.msg: Global purchase limit exceeded

errors.name: InvalidAmount
errors.msg: Amount must be greater than zero

errors.name: WithdrawalAlreadyClosed
errors.msg: Withdrawal is already closed

errors.name: MintChangeRequiresEmptyVault
errors.msg: Supported USDC mint changes require an empty vault for the current configured mint

errors.name: MintChangeRequiresSettledPool
errors.msg: Supported USDC mint changes require a fully settled pool with no live exposure

errors.name: DuplicateSettlementClaim
errors.msg: Duplicate claim account provided for settlement

errors.name: ArithmeticError
errors.msg: Arithmetic operation failed

errors.name: InvalidMetadataAccount
errors.msg: Invalid metadata account for the BunkerCash mint

errors.name: InvalidFeeBps
errors.msg: Fee must be between 0 and 10 percent

errors.name: ClaimAlreadyCancelled
errors.msg: Claim has already been cancelled

errors.name: ClaimAlreadyProcessed
errors.msg: Claim has already been fully processed

errors.name: InvalidClaimOwner
errors.msg: Only the claim owner can cancel this claim

errors.name: InvalidMasterWallet
errors.msg: Master wallet does not match the pool's master wallet

fields.name: total_deposited_usdc
docs: Monotonic field tracking total USDC deposited; reset only via `reset_purchase_counter`
